title: Earnzy - Micro-Task Marketplace Platform
overview: Earnzy is a modern, full-stack web application for connecting buyers and workers for micro-tasks, featuring real-time dashboards, role-based access, and a beautiful, responsive UI.
features: 🎨 Modern UI/UX: Glassmorphism Design, Responsive Layout, Smooth Animations, Dark/Light Theme Support
🔐 Authentication & Security: Firebase Authentication, Role-Based Access Control, Protected Routes, Secure API Communication
📊 Dashboard System: Worker, Buyer, and Admin Dashboards, Real-Time Updates
💰 Task & Payment System: Micro-Task Marketplace, Coin-Based Rewards, Submission Management, Payment Processing
🖼️ Media Management: Cloudinary Integration, Image Preview, File Validation, CDN Delivery
📱 Mobile Experience: Mobile-First Design, Collapsible Navigation, Bottom Navigation, Responsive Tables
🔔 Notification System: Real-Time Notifications, Portal-Based Rendering, Smart Positioning, Action Integration
📄 Content Management: Dynamic Page Titles, SEO Optimization, Breadcrumb Navigation, 404 Error Handling
⚡ Performance & UX: React Query, Lazy Loading, Pagination, Loading States
🛠️ Developer Experience: TypeScript Ready, ESLint Configuration, Vite Build System, Modular Architecture
user_features: 👤 Admin Login: Use provided credentials for admin access
👤 Role-Based Dashboards: Separate experiences for Workers, Buyers, and Admins
📝 Task Management: Create, browse, and submit micro-tasks
💸 Payment & Rewards: Coin-based system for task payments and withdrawals
🔔 Real-Time Notifications: Stay updated on assignments, approvals, and payments
📱 Mobile-Optimized: Touch-friendly navigation and responsive layouts

title: Plantopia - Plant E-Commerce Platform
overview: A modern, full-stack e-commerce platform for plant enthusiasts built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
features: 🛒 E-Commerce Core: Product Catalog, Shopping Cart, Checkout System, Order Management, Wishlist
👤 User Management: Authentication, User Profiles, Role-Based Access, Order History
🔧 Admin Dashboard: Product, Order, User, Blog Management, Analytics
📱 User Experience: Responsive Design, Search & Filter, Product Reviews, Blog System, Image Upload
🚀 Technical Features: Real-time Updates, Image Optimization, PWA Ready, SEO Optimized, Error Handling
user_features: 🛒 Browse and purchase plants and gardening supplies
🛍️ Manage shopping cart and wishlist
💳 Secure checkout with Stripe integration
👤 Customizable user profiles and order history
🔧 Admin dashboard for managing products, orders, users, and blogs
📱 Fully responsive and mobile-optimized experience

title: RelicVeil - Historical Artifacts Tracking Platform
overview: RelicVeil is a modern web application designed for history enthusiasts, collectors, and researchers to document, share, and discover historical artifacts.
features: 🔐 Secure Authentication: Firebase Authentication for secure user management
📝 Artifact Management: Add, update, and delete artifacts with detailed information
❤️ Like System: Interactive like/dislike functionality for artifacts
🔍 Advanced Search: Full-text search across artifact names, descriptions, and locations
📱 Responsive Design: Fully responsive layout for all devices
🌐 Real-time Updates: Dynamic content updates without page refresh
user_features: 👤 User Profiles: Personalized user profiles with artifact collections
📋 My Artifacts: Manage your own artifact collection
❤️ Liked Artifacts: Track and access your liked artifacts
🔍 Browse Artifacts: Explore artifacts from other users
📊 Featured Artifacts: Discover trending and popular artifacts

title: TalentForge Freelance Marketplace
overview: TalentForge is a modern freelance marketplace platform where users can post, browse, and bid on tasks.
features: 📝 Post, edit, and delete freelance tasks
🔍 Browse and filter tasks by category
💸 Bid on tasks and view all bids
👤 User authentication (register, login, Google sign-in)
🌓 Dark mode toggle (global, animated, accessible)
⚡ Animated slider and typewriter effects on homepage
🔔 Toast notifications for errors and success
🦾 Responsive, mobile-friendly design
🦾 Accessible forms and modals
👤 Profile management
user_features: 👤 Register and manage your profile
📝 Post and manage your own tasks
💸 Place bids on available tasks
🔍 Browse and filter tasks by category
🌙 Toggle dark mode for a comfortable viewing experience

title: Logic Gates Simulator
overview: A comprehensive Logic Gates Simulator built with Java 17, LWJGL, Slick2D, and JNA. Design, simulate, and analyze digital circuits visually with real-time feedback and advanced circuit analysis tools.
features: 🟩 Basic Logic Gates: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR, Buffer
➕ Arithmetic Components: Half/Full Adders & Subtractors
🔢 Data Processing: Encoders (4-to-2, 8-to-3), Decoders (2-to-4, 3-to-8)
⚖️ Comparators: 1-bit and 2-bit with full comparison outputs
🔀 Multiplexers/Demultiplexers: 2-to-1, 4-to-1, 1-to-2, 1-to-4
⏱️ Sequential Logic: D, JK, SR, T Flip-Flops, Clock Generator
📊 Circuit Analysis: Truth Table, Boolean Equation, Timing Diagram, Karnaugh Map (Quine-McCluskey)
💾 Save/Load: Custom .lgsworld format with versioning
📋 Clipboard: Multi-gate selection, copy, paste with connections
🖱️ Visual Design: Drag-and-drop, real-time simulation, wire connections
🔍 Zoom & Pan: Mouse wheel zoom, drag pan for large circuits
⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts: Ctrl+C/Ctrl+V for copy/paste
🌐 Cross-platform: Windows, Linux, macOS
user_features: 👤 Visual circuit design with drag-and-drop interface
⚡ Real-time simulation and feedback
🔗 Easy connection management between gates
🗂️ Save and load custom circuits
🧮 Automatic truth table and Boolean equation generation
🗺️ Karnaugh map simplification for logic optimization
🔎 Zoom and pan for large circuit navigation
🖱️ Multi-gate selection and clipboard operations
